creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue Mar 26 16:10:54 2013
New Revision: 315311
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/315311

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.6

  Submitted by:	Ports fury

Modified:
  head/audio/libmtp/Makefile
  head/audio/libmtp/distinfo

Modified: head/audio/libmtp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/libmtp/Makefile	Tue Mar 26 16:08:28 2013	(r315310)
+++ head/audio/libmtp/Makefile	Tue Mar 26 16:10:54 2013	(r315311)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libmtp
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.5
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.6
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	SF
 
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ OPTIONS_DEFINE=	MTPZ
 OPTIONS_DEFAULT=	MTPZ
 MTPZ_DESC=	Enable functionality to connect to MTPZ devices
 
-USES=	pathfix
+USES=		pathfix
 USE_ICONV=	yes
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes

==============================================================================

+SIZE (libmtp-1.1.6.tar.gz) = 733519
